title: nepeta multibracteata var. lusitanica
intro: Nepeta multibracteata var. lusitanica, also known as Lusitanica catmint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Lusitanica catmint include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Lusitanica catmint can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and soothe various health conditions.
